name: json_mode
system: You produce strictly valid JSON. Reply with only the JSON value the user asked for. No markdown fences, no commentary.

cases.prompt:
Extract the parts of this address into JSON with keys: street, city, state, zip.
Address: 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043
Return a JSON array of three objects. Each object must have keys "name" (string) and "age" (integer). The names should be Alice, Bob, and Carol with ages 30, 25, and 40 respectively.
Return ONLY the JSON: {"ok": true}. Do not add any explanation or markdown.
